name: Antioch
description_short: Antioch Credit Union is a Cleveland, OH-based credit union offering checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and financial planning services to local members.
description_long: Antioch Credit Union serves the Cleveland, Ohio community as a member-owned financial cooperative regulated by the NCUA. Founded to enhance the financial well-being of Cleveland's residents, the credit union operates as a traditional financial institution with digital and in-person services. Antioch CU offers a comprehensive suite of products including high-yield checking and savings accounts (Share Draft Accounts), flexible auto loans for new and used vehicles, mortgage options, investment and retirement planning, and brokered certificates of deposit. Members have access to online banking, mobile banking, bill pay, debit cards, physical checks, and ATM networks. The credit union provides competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.00% for new vehicles and 7.00% for used vehicles, with an average loan amount of $20,000 per vehicle across its membership. Antioch distinguishes itself through personalized financial counseling, comprehensive financial education resources, and exclusive member benefits and discounts. The credit union emphasizes wealth management services and dedicated financial planning support alongside traditional banking products. Their free checking account option with no monthly fees and no-cost share drafts appeals to cost-conscious members. As a credit union, Antioch serves a limited geographic footprint centered in Cleveland. The institution reports modest scale metrics: 116 checking accounts with $271,897 in total share drafts, and auto lending to approximately 5 new and 9 used vehicle buyers. While they offer legitimate financial services and NCUA membership protection, the limited member base and geographic concentration suggest a small regional institution. Prospective members should verify current branch locations and service areas before applying.
services: Free checking accounts (Share Draft Accounts) with no monthly fees
New auto loans with rates starting at 4.00%
Used auto loans with rates starting at 7.00%
pros: Free checking accounts with no monthly fees and free share drafts
Competitive auto loan rates: 4.00% for new vehicles and 7.00% for used vehicles
Personalized financial counseling and education resources available
Comprehensive services including mortgages, investment planning, and retirement services
Online and mobile banking with bill pay capabilities
Brokered certificates of deposit options for higher returns
cons: Very small institution with only 116 checking accounts, suggesting limited resources and services
Geographic limitation to Cleveland, OH area may restrict accessibility for non-local members
Minimal lending activity reported (5 new auto loans, 9 used auto loans) indicates limited lending infrastructure
Limited publicly available information about savings account rates, CD rates, or mortgage terms
No mention of credit card offerings or lines of credit products
best_for: Cleveland, Ohio residents seeking local credit union membership and community financial support
Members prioritizing free checking accounts and no-fee banking services
Auto buyers seeking competitive rates on vehicle financing with personalized service
Individuals interested in financial counseling and wealth management from a member-owned institution
diagnosis: Antioch Credit Union is best suited for Cleveland-area residents seeking traditional credit union banking with free checking, personalized financial counseling, and competitive auto lending rates. The primary caveat is that this is a very small regional institution with minimal scale, making it important to verify current service offerings and branch accessibility before joining.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
